meaning: n.[化]脑下垂体后叶荷尔蒙之一种
examples: The body produces Oxytocin, the bonding hormone.
This is where the vasopressin and oxytocin come in.
Physical touch of any kind drives up the brain's oxytocin levels, for both men and women.
You would find men with children to have higher levels of oxytocin as well.
